The '''Pembric asteroid field''' was located in the [[Pembric system/Legends|Pembric system]]. The field surrounded [[Pembric II]], and its asteroids constantly bombarded the surface of the planet. The field was rich in [[hfredium]], and was mined during the time [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] controlled the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].
